about.subtitle: ABOUT US
about.title: We Build the Digital Future
about.description1: Hisotech delivers modern, optimized technology solutions for businesses in the digital era. We combine creative thinking and advanced technology to create sustainable value.
about.description2: The Hisotech team continuously innovates, committed to partnering with customers on their comprehensive digital transformation journey.

duong.bio: Performs inspection, maintenance, installation, and repair of technical systems/products as assigned. Provides technical support to customers and the sales department.

huy.bio: Repairs technical systems/products as assigned. Provides technical support to customers, sales, or production departments as needed.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Our freedom of choice is unlimited, and when nothing prevents us from doing what we love most.
faq.consultingDesc: Our experts are always ready to listen and answer all your questions.

items.q1: Can I see a demo before purchasing your business services?
items.a1: Of course! We are always happy to provide a detailed demo so you can get the most comprehensive overview of our products. Please contact us to schedule an appointment.
items.q2: Do you provide any guarantees or warranties for your business services?
items.a2: Yes, all HISOTECH services and products come with long-term warranty and technical support policies, ensuring absolute peace of mind for customers.
items.q3: Can I customize your business services to fit my specific needs?
items.a3: Absolutely. We specialize in providing tailor-made solutions for the unique needs of each business to achieve optimal results.

consult.title: Want to Talk to an Expert?
consult.description: Leave your information, and we'll provide free consultation within 24 hours. Start your digital transformation journey today.
